hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.command' | grep -qE '(gh pr (create|edit)|gh api .*pulls/[0-9])' && echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"ask","permissionDecisionReason":"Before creating/updating this PR: review the work in this branch and suggest any CLAUDE.md additions worth making (testing gotchas, project conventions, infrastructure quirks, recurring patterns). Confirm to proceed; cancel to do the review first."}}' || true
